title: Premium Subscription
description: Manage your Premium access and trial period.

banner.trialEnded: Your trial has ended. Subscribe to continue using Premium features.

locked.title: Premium Subscription Required
locked.description: This section is available only with an active trial or Premium subscription.

messages.trialActive: Your trial is active. You can subscribe now to avoid any interruption.
messages.trialExpired: Your trial has ended. Subscribe now to keep Premium access.
messages.active: Your subscription is active. Manage it from the billing portal.
messages.inactive: You do not have an active subscription. Subscribe to unlock Premium features.
